title: Crowns of The Realms
description: Having a hard time exploring minecraft wolrd, well now there's fabulous crowns that help you with they amazing abilities
body:
Having a hard time exploring minecraft wolrd, well now there's fabulous crowns that help you with they amazing abilities, the abilities automatically activate once the player wear the crown, each crown have they own special abilities like Night Vision/Regeneration/Conduit Power/Fire Resistance and Jump Boost. You can easiest craft and wear these crowns so craft your crown and explore minecraft.


Requare GeckoLib
